nasb.text: then I will so order My blessing for you in the sixth year that it will bring forth the crop for three years.

esv.text: I will command my blessing on you in the sixth year, so that it will produce a crop sufficient for three years.

cnv.text: 在第六年，我必命我的福臨到你們，地就會生產足夠三年食用的出產。

ccb.text: 我要在第六年赐福给你们，使田地的出产够你们吃三年。
